case_title: PETER SILVA VS. CAL TRANS DEPT. OF TRANSPORTATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CAL TRANS DEPT. OF TRANSPORTATION
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY SILVA, PETER CAL TRANS DEPT. OF TRANSPORTATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,203.22 FILED BY SILVA, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT CAL TRANS DEPT. OF TRANSPORTATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PETER SILVA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAL TRANS DEPT. OF TRANSPORTATION IS PRESENT. APPEARING ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF IS CLAIMS OFFICER, THY PHAM. THE COURT LACKS VENUE TO PROCEED BECAUSE THE INCIDENT OCCURRED IN SAN MATEO COUNTY AND DEFENDANT TIMELY OBJECTED TO JURISDICTION. COURT REGRETS PLAINTIFF WAS MISINFORMED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
